title: Git Essential Commands
description: Essential git commands for daily workflow — commit, rebase, stash, and more.

entries.label: Stage & Commit
entries.description: Stage all changes and commit with a message

entries.label: Amend Last Commit
entries.description: Edit the last commit message or add missed changes

entries.label: Push to Remote
entries.description: Push local commits to the remote branch

entries.label: Pull with Rebase
entries.description: Fetch and rebase local commits on top of remote

entries.label: Interactive Rebase
entries.description: Squash, reorder, or edit the last n commits

entries.label: Pretty Log
entries.description: Compact visual graph of all branches and commits

entries.label: Cherry-Pick Commit
entries.description: Apply a specific commit from another branch

entries.label: Bisect (Find Bug)
entries.command: git bisect start && git bisect bad && git bisect good <sha>
entries.description: Binary search to find the commit that introduced a bug

entries.label: Diff Staged Changes
entries.description: Show changes that are staged for the next commit
